description: v5.2 Sub-Project A: Dispatch Intelligence — 3-stage pipeline (score → probe → dispatch) for smarter subagent routing

transitions.note: Research originated from v5.1 stress test findings
3 research docs written during stress test
All tasks complete. Key finding: perms are controller-scoped.

Validated in production via 6-sprint audit remediation program (post-stress-test + M-1/2/3/4 + Path A). Hundreds of subagent dispatches routed through 3-stage pipeline with zero regressions attributable to dispatch-intelligence. Evidence: audit-remediation-program-185-findings-case-study.md.
